[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 1000000000 1
2 0000000100 1
3 0000010110 3
4 0011111000 5
5 1100001001 4
6 1000001101 4
7 0011100001 4
